steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $54$, so the answer is $54$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute the value x = 3
steps.content: Replace $x$ with $3$ in $$f(x) = x^2 + x + 42.$$ This gives $$f(3) = (3)^2 + 3 + 42.$$
